title: Digatext's Overlay (a PvP Pack)
description: A texture pack designed for PvP, allowing you to climb the ranks of your favorite PvP server in comfort.
body:
## Digatext Overlay V2

A texture pack designed for PvP, allowing you to climb the ranks of your favorite PvP server in comfort.

## Features:
> Golden Carrot Food Bar (with appleskin support)

> Dark GUI

> Animated Campfires

> Mini Items

> Low Shield

> Low Fire

> KB1 Indicator (requires cit reswen)

> No Fog

> Ore Borders

> Whiter Snow

> Smaller Grass

> Different Shield Texture

> Gray Slimes

> Gray Hearts

> Gray Elytra

> Gray Widgets

> 3D End Crystal

> Unintrusive Weather

> Unintrusive Particles

> Legacy Bed Icons

> Different Totem Texture

> Classic Netherite Armor

> White Enchant Glint

& much more...
